summary: Footer and Contact section appear updated to remove address/location blocks while keeping emails/GSTIN/legal info. About section location-card removal cannot be fully verified due to truncation, but the visible About copy still contains a location reference (“Chennai, Tamil Nadu”), which may conflict with the overall goal to remove all location/address content sitewide.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove all location/address content from the website (including non-address location references). The About section still references a location (“Chennai, Tamil Nadu”).
missing_requirements.reason: The BuildRequest title states removal of all location/address content. In the provided AboutSection snippet, the main description still includes “registered as a proprietorship in Chennai, Tamil Nadu,” which is location content.
